description: Working-capital stress contribution as a trapezoidal curve. Captures DSO/DPO/DIO blowouts during a stress window (e.g. tariff shock causes longer payment cycles or higher in-transit inventory). Returned in decimal annualised units.
formula_pseudocode: wc(t) = trapezoid(initial, peak, stress_timing); out_decimal = wc(t);
source_citations: Atradius Payment Practices Barometer (annual, free PDF) for DSO/DPO baselines.
Intuit QuickBooks Small Business Late Payments Report (annual, free).
V1 inline WC stress (30bps baseline -> 50bps stressed for textiles, DSO 60d -> 90d) preserved verbatim by india-us-textiles.json for Iteration 1.
